LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTORNEY MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF SHAIKH ZAFAR IS GRANTED. SAMER DANFOURA AND CHRIS DEWYS OF THE LAW OFFICES OF DANFOURA LAW OFFICES ARE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, EFFECTIVE UPON FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher A. Dewys of the Danfoura Law Offices (415.970.8012) appears as moving counsel seeking to be relieved as attorney of record for plaintiff Zafar Shaikh

No other appearance is made in this matter

ATTORNEY MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF SHAIKH ZAFAR is GRANTED. Samer Danfoura and Chris DeWys of the Law Offices of Danfoura Law Offices are relieved as counsel, effective upon filing of proof of service. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
